title: Twitter Countdown Bot
description: A simple Twitter bot to countdown the days to a movie premiere. Uses Tweepy to access the Twitter API. Deployed and scheduled with Heroku to make daily tweets.
label: 3000+ views/day + Retweeted by the official movie account!

title: Personal Website
description: An autobiographical static site, generated using Gatsby. Source code written in React. Styled with Fomantic UI. Hosted on GitHub Pages.
label: You are here!
